title: Wawa and Retail Space - Philadelphia, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: Existing Industrial Brownfield Demolition and Redevelopment 5,585 sf Wawa Food Market with 8 fuel canopy pump station 11,000 sf Mixed Use Retail: Xfinity Retail Store, Fine Wine and Spirits PennDOT Access Improvements Soil Remediation / Piles & Caissons Individual NPDES Permit
contentHtml:
Key Features:

  • Existing Industrial Brownfield Demolition and Redevelopment
  • 5,585 sf Wawa Food Market with 8 fuel canopy pump station
  • 11,000 sf Mixed Use Retail: Xfinity Retail Store, Fine Wine and Spirits
  • PennDOT Access Improvements
  • Soil Remediation / Piles & Caissons
  • Individual NPDES Permit
